claims.discrepancy: Source evidence, test inventory, route-handler/direct API Jest evidence, focused local mocked telemetry/notification invocation evidence, local audit helper fail-open/error visibility evidence, browser runtime evidence, and partial live-server negative-path HTTP transport evidence exist. Controlled Chromium admin-boundary and verification-admin journey commands passed under one worker. MRA-E025 records that the pre-change admin-auth `.admin.spec.ts` list command found 0 tests, then the focused read-only admin, focused admin action, and combined `chromium-admin` gate passed after the harness/test updates; the combined gate ran 44 tests using 1 worker, `.last-run.json` reported passed with no failed tests, and `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. Live-server probes verified missing Origin/CSRF, OPTIONS, invalid document kind, and unauthenticated valid-kind statuses/cache headers. Local Jest verified `logAdminAction` fail-opens and logs operational visibility metadata when `prisma.auditLog.create` rejects, with related admin/verification/document tests still passing. Ignored admin-host race coverage, authenticated admin signed-URL success, real storage/provider signed URL behavior, real email provider delivery, inbox/bounce/webhook behavior, provider telemetry/observability runtime, live browser/admin-operation audit failure injection, production observability pipeline delivery, database outage runtime proof, and other provider/runtime proof were not run.
claims.recommendedFix: Run the remaining admin-host race coverage, authenticated admin document-route success/signed-URL probes, real storage/provider behavior, real provider delivery/observability commands, live browser/admin-operation audit failure injection, production observability delivery checks, and database outage runtime proof in 11-test-traceability-matrix.md and update runtime-verification.md.

claims.claim: Migration-backed moderation/reporting/verification source invariants are line-audited.

coverageGaps.gap: Controlled Chromium admin-boundary and verification-admin journey coverage passed in MRA-E021, and MRA-E025 passed the focused read-only admin, focused admin action, and combined chromium-admin .admin.spec.ts browser gate. The remaining P1 browser residual is ignored/unrun admin-host race coverage.

Route-handler/direct API Jest checks passed in MRA-E019; MRA-E022 verified the narrower route-handler baseline plus live-server negative/status/header parity for missing Origin/CSRF, OPTIONS, invalid document kind, and unauthenticated valid-kind document access. Authenticated admin signed-URL success, real storage/provider behavior, and any admin-session success path remain unverified.

Local mocked private-feedback telemetry invocation and verification approval/rejection notification email invocation are verified by MRA-E020; real email provider delivery, inbox/bounce/webhook proof, provider observability/telemetry runtime, and other provider/runtime proof remain unverified.
Tracked migration SQL line ranges were audited in MRA-E024 and related Jest coverage passed. Production/staging database migration-state proof remains unverified.

Local Jest verifies `logAdminAction` fail-open behavior and operational visibility metadata when `prisma.auditLog.create` rejects in MRA-E023. Live browser/admin-operation failure injection, production observability pipeline delivery, provider telemetry, and database outage runtime proof remain unverified.
